title: AI Makes the Cybersecurity Game Faster, Not New
abstract: AI Makes the Cybersecurity Game Faster, Not New may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform general plat...
abstract_zh: AI 把网络安全游戏变得飞快，不是新人！这工具虽然小众，但瞄准痛点，精准出击。就像在 AI 的海洋里，它就是那条专精的小鱼，游得快还吃得香！
